issues.description: Missing action to negate the effect of opponent's card. DSL has only PowerBoost but card text requires effect negation mechanic (not currently represented in action types)
Second effect with PowerBoost amount=0 is nonsensical and does not correspond to card text
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text says 'during this turn' which should be 'DuringYourTurn'
Target should allow Leader OR Character (scope should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOrLeader' or similar), currently only 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'
